_description: Extracted from netgear/cm600 modem.har: RouterStatus.asp embeds a form whose action has no query token, so the static endpoint suffices — no pre_fetch_url or endpoint_pattern emitted. Hidden input values are JS-rewritten before submit (RsAction committed as 2, page HTML says 1), so params stay unextracted.

content.text:
<html><body>
<form action='/goform/RouterStatus' method="post">
<button type="button" class="page-table-button" onClick="advButtonClick(2);">Reboot</button>
<input type="hidden" value="1" name="buttonSelect" />
<input type="hidden" name="RsAction" value=1>
</form>
</body></html>
